nodes.label: Toan Anh Thanh LMS Implementation Plan
nodes.norm_label: toan anh thanh lms implementation plan

nodes.label: Toan Anh Thanh LMS Design Spec
nodes.norm_label: toan anh thanh lms design spec

nodes.label: Adapter Pattern for Volatile Subsystems
nodes.source_location: Kien truc / Nguyen tac mo rong
nodes.rationale: Applied to the parts most likely to change (AI backend and video storage) so the demo can ship with mock/local implementations while remaining swap-ready for open-notebook and Google Drive once credentials/API keys exist.

nodes.label: AIProvider Interface
nodes.rationale: Contract (analyzeLecture, generateExercises, chat, generateSlides) decouples AI features from any specific LLM backend; selected via AI_PROVIDER env var.

nodes.label: MockAIProvider
nodes.rationale: Default provider returning real prepared math content per seeded lesson so the full AI flow is demoable without an LLM API key.

nodes.label: OpenNotebookProvider
nodes.rationale: REST client to open-notebook (ON_API_URL, notebook per lesson); works when configured, raises a clear configuration error when env is missing.

nodes.label: StorageProvider Interface
nodes.rationale: save() returns an opaque videoRef and createReadStream() supports Range, so the real file URL/location never reaches the client and backends are interchangeable.

nodes.label: LocalStorageProvider
nodes.rationale: Default backend serving MP4s from apps/server/media/ for the local SQLite demo (no Docker, no cloud dependency).

nodes.label: GoogleDriveProvider (stub)
nodes.rationale: Complete stub awaiting OAuth credentials; throws an instructive configuration error instead of failing silently.

nodes.label: Quiz Gate (Sequential Unlock)
nodes.rationale: Students must reach passScore (default 70) on a lesson's quiz to unlock the next lesson; first lesson of the first chapter is always open. Enforces sequential learning (isLessonUnlocked in quiz service).

nodes.label: HMAC Signed Stream Token
nodes.rationale: Short-lived (60s) HMAC-SHA256 token bound to userId+lessonId on /api/stream/:lessonId; prevents URL sharing and hides the real file path. Client requests a fresh token on every play.

nodes.label: Dynamic Moving Watermark
nodes.rationale: CSS overlay of user email + timestamp moving randomly over the video (pointer-events: none) to deter and trace screen recordings; server-side ffmpeg burn-in explicitly out of scope.

nodes.label: Client Security Guard (Web Deterrents)
nodes.rationale: Blocks context menu, F12/Ctrl+Shift+I/J/C, Ctrl+U/S/P; detects DevTools via window-size heuristic + debugger timing; on detection logs a SecurityEvent and force-logs-out. Applied only to STUDENT role. Honestly documented as deterrent-only on pure web.

nodes.label: Electron setContentProtection
nodes.rationale: Desktop app is the hard enforcement channel: setContentProtection(true) blacks out screen capture on Windows/macOS and setDisplayMediaRequestHandler is blocked, because pure web cannot block recording 100%.

nodes.label: RBAC (JWT + requireRole)
nodes.rationale: 15-minute access token + refresh token; requireRole('ADMIN') middleware separates admin CRUD/monitoring from student learning flows; BANNED users cannot log in.

nodes.label: ActivityLog / SecurityEvent Monitoring
nodes.rationale: Every key action (login, video play/pause/seek, quiz, AI usage) is logged so admins get per-student timelines and prominent security alerts on the dashboard.

nodes.label: Prisma Data Model (User/Course/Chapter/Lesson/Quiz/Progress)
nodes.rationale: SQLite + Prisma chosen for zero-infrastructure local demo; Course->Chapter->Lesson tree with order fields drives both the content UI and the sequential gate.

links.source_location: ActivityType values match ActivityLog.type enum in design
SecurityEventType values match SecurityEvent.type in design
Contracts: stream module reads via StorageProvider.createReadStream with Range
detection -> POST SecurityEvent shown to admin
Both address screen-capture/inspection deterrence; desktop is the hard channel, web is best-effort
